# Stay Portland

> Portland's local vacation rental booking platform. Book direct — no fees, lowest price guaranteed.

## What We Do

Stay Portland offers 500+ design-forward vacation rental homes across Portland, Oregon. Guests book directly through stayportland.com with no booking fees — saving 10-15% compared to Airbnb or VRBO.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://stayportland.com
- Browse Properties: https://stayportland.com/properties
- Contact: https://stayportland.com/contact

## How Booking Works

1. Browse properties at /properties (filter by dates, guests, neighborhood)
2. Select a property to see photos, amenities, and availability
3. Choose dates and number of guests for an instant quote
4. Book securely with a credit card — no account required

## Why Stay Portland

- **No booking fees**: Book direct and skip the 10-15% service fees charged by Airbnb and VRBO
- **Lowest price guarantee**: Our direct rates are always the lowest available
- **Hotel-quality comfort**: Professionally cleaned homes with premium linens and amenities
- **Locally curated**: Every home is hand-selected and styled with Portland character
- **Walkable neighborhoods**: Properties in Division St, Alberta Arts, Hawthorne, Pearl District, Mississippi, Kerns, and more

## Property Highlights

- 500+ homes across Portland's best neighborhoods
- Studios to 5+ bedroom houses
- Pet-friendly options available
- Full kitchens, fast Wi-Fi, and dedicated workspaces in most homes

## Contact

Visit https://stayportland.com/contact to reach the Stay Portland team.

## Extended Info

For more detailed information, see: https://stayportland.com/llms-full.txt
